content:
Character skin promo art's background text
(note: 24's text is the same with her banner text, so perharps they're the same, I'll need Murphy's banner to know)

Salvador: Merciful Maker, I hereby offer my flesh, my blood,
my lif. I offer everything that thou hast give,
for a Blessing for thine children.

Liz: The harbringers of spring, "Dansre des adolescentes",
games of the rival tribes, "Jeux des cités rivales" and
Sacrificial dance: "Danse sacrale".

~~The Question to Death, the Void, and Nothingness is ~~24: One, two, three, four..... how many you are there?
Five, six, seven, eight...... do you still remember 
her?

Murphy: From an early age she knew, that nothing comes for 
free. A prayer for a doll,  a ritual for a dress, but for
what she wants the most, she will need a sacrifice.
thread_title: 游戏美术资源上的文字

content:
this is the reference for Liz's background text, which is the main inspiration behind her character (the other is The Green Flame)
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/The_Rite_of_Spring

embeds.title: The Rite of Spring
embeds.description: The Rite of Spring (French: Le Sacre du printemps) is a ballet and orchestral concert work by the Russian composer Igor Stravinsky. It was written for the 1913 Paris season of Sergei Diaghilev's Ballets Russes company; the original choreography was by Vaslav Nijinsky with stage designs and costumes

thread_title: 游戏美术资源上的文字

content:
Uvhash: Tibi, Magnum Innominandum, signa stellarum nigrarum et bufoniformus Sadoque sigillum
Agrippa: 'Ag 'lak Sauron, Daoloth asgu'i,
Eihort phul'aag'
